name: AIO Catalog
author: My Media Vault
description: All-in-one metadata catalog: Movies & TV (TMDB), Games (IGDB / SteamGridDB), Music (MusicBrainz), Books (Google Books, with Open Library as a keyless fallback), Comics (Comic Vine) and Manga (AniList, keyless). Drill into a TV show for its episodes, a comic series for its issues, or an album for its tracks.

settings.label: TMDB API Key
settings.description: themoviedb.org API key — enables Movies and TV Shows.

settings.label: IGDB / Twitch Client ID
settings.description: Twitch application client id — enables Games (IGDB).

settings.label: IGDB / Twitch Client Secret
settings.description: Twitch application client secret — enables Games (IGDB).

settings.label: SteamGridDB Key (optional)
settings.description: Optional: nicer game grid artwork from steamgriddb.com.

settings.label: Google Books Key (optional)
settings.description: Optional Google Books API key — higher rate limits for the Books catalog.

settings.label: Comic Vine API Key
settings.description: Free comicvine.gamespot.com API key — enables the Comics catalog. (Manga needs no key.)

settings.label: Show adult manga (18+)
settings.description: Include adult (NSFW) titles in the Manga catalog. Off by default.
